expectations.evidence: Lines 21-27 define COLOR_SUCCESS, COLOR_ERROR, COLOR_WARN, COLOR_MUTED, COLOR_ACTIVE, COLOR_TITLE, COLOR_INFO. Used throughout (lines 96, 98, 119-121, 196, 206).
No table output with fixed width columns. Script displays step progress but not tabular data with W_* variables.
Lines 35-42 define trunc() function present in codebase, though not actively used in main output flow.
Lines 5-6 define cleanup() with show_cur and printf RESET, trap set for EXIT INT TERM.
Lines 50-61 spin() with frames and sleep 0.12. Lines 81-86 splash bar with sleep 0.01 delays. Lines 103-125 run_step() uses spinner while command runs.
Lines 172 DRY_RUN=false. Lines 175-177 parse --dry-run flag. Lines 95-100 show different behavior with 'DRY RUN' text and sleep 0.5.
All output consistently uses 2-space indent: lines 96, 98, 110, 119-121, 196, 206, 216, 253-255 all start with '  '.
All colored output uses printf (lines 77, 96, 98, 110, 119-121, 196, 206). No 'echo -e' found.
Lines 195, 198 use section() which outputs '━━ %s ━━' pattern: 'printf "  ${COLOR_TITLE}${BOLD}━━ %s ━━${RESET}\n\n"'.
